description_long: This is a black, metal fence composed of five evenly spaced horizontal rails supported by two vertical posts at each end. The structure is minimalistic and utilitarian, with no visible decorative elements or embellishments. The top edge of the fence is flat, and the posts terminate without any distinct caps or finials. The rails are cylindrical and appear to be welded or securely fastened to the posts, providing a sturdy barrier. The overall design suggests it is intended for use in urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or parking lots to control pedestrian or vehicle movement. The finish is smooth and slightly glossy, indicating a protective coating, likely powder-coated or painted metal.
description: A black, metal fence with five horizontal rails and two vertical posts, featuring a flat top and a smooth, glossy finish. The design is simple and functional, with no decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing all five horizontal rails and both vertical posts, highlighting the fence's full width and flat top.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the thin profile of the fence, with only the edge of the posts and rails visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, showing the five horizontal rails and two posts.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow profile with minimal visible detail.
